assistant: Vasudeva ki pooja jalasay (reservoir), ghar, bageeche, pul (bridge), pedon aur anya devi-devtaon ki sthapna ya consecration ke samay karni chahiye.

user: Vastupati devta ka swaroop aur unke astra kya hain?
assistant: Vastupati ke char haath, teen aankhen aur bada sharir hota hai. Woh peele kapde pehente hain aur jataon se yukt hote hain. Unke haathon mein gada, trishul, kulhadi aur khatvanga hota hai, aur woh ek kachuye (tortoise) par baithe hote hain.

user: Chandra, Mangal aur Budh devtaon ka dhyan kaise kiya jata hai?
assistant: Chandra dev ek haath mein amrit aur dusre se danmudra dikhate hain. Mangal dev thode jhuke hue hote hain aur haath mein danda rakhte hain. Budh dev ko ek balak ke roop mein dhyan kiya jata hai jinke maathe par ghungrale baal hote hain.

user: Surya bhagwan ke char-bhuji roop ka varnan kijiye.
assistant: Surya dev ke char haath hote hain, jinmein se do mein kamal (lotus) hote hain. Ek haath se woh vardaan dete hain aur ek haath abhay (fearlessness) dene ki mudra mein hota hai.

user: Indra aur Agni devtaon ke vahan aur pehchan kya hai?
assistant: Indra dev ka rang peela hota hai, woh Airavata haathi par baithte hain aur vajra dharan karte hain. Agni dev laal rang ke hote hain, woh bakre (goat) ki savari karte hain aur 'Shakti' naam ka shastra rakhte hain.

user: Yama, Nirrti, Varuna aur Vayu devtaon ke vahanon ke baare mein bataiye.
assistant: Yama bhainse (buffalo) par baithte hain, Nirrti ghode (horse) par, Varuna magar (crocodile) par aur Vayu hiran (deer) par savari karte hain.

user: Kubera aur Ishan (Shiva) ke dhyan mein kya visheshataein hain?
assistant: Kubera soney jaise rang ke hain aur ratno ke sinhasan par baithte hain. Ishan (Shiva) nandi (bull) par viraajman hain, trishul rakhte hain aur unka tej purnima ke chand jaisa hota hai.

user: Brahma ji ke sharir ka rang aur unke haathon mein kya hota hai?
assistant: Brahma ji ka rang lal kamal jaisa hota hai. Woh hans (swan) par baithte hain aur unke char chehre hain. Woh haath mein jap-mala aur pustak (book) rakhte hain.

user: Ananta devta ke swaroop ka varnan kaise kiya gaya hai?
assistant: Ananta ka rang barf aur chandrama jaisa bilkul safed hai. Unke hazaar aankhen aur hazaar pair hote hain, aur Deva-Danava sab unka dhyan karte hain.

user: Vastu aur Surya ke liye kin mantron ka ullekh kiya gaya hai?
assistant: Vastu mantra 'Kshraṃ Kshīṃ Kshūṃ Kshraīṃ Kshrauṃ Kshraḥ' hai aur Surya mantra 'Om Hrīṃ Tigmarasmaye Ārogyadāya Svāhā' hai.

user: Ganesha ke dhyan mein unke astra aur vahan ka kya varnan hai?
assistant: Ganesha ka rang Bandhuka phool jaisa hai aur unki teen aankhen hain. Woh saanp ka janeu pehente hain aur char haathon mein shankh, chakra, talwar aur kamal lekar laal kamal par baithte hain.

user: Bhagwan Shiva (Mahesha) ke das haathon aur panch mukhon ka kya mahatva hai?
assistant: Shiva ke panch chehre alag-alag rangon ke hote hain. Unke das haathon mein kapala, agni, pasha, dhanush, kulhadi, trishul, vajra, ankush aur arrow hote hain, aur ek haath se woh vardaan dete hain.

user: Gauripatta par Devi ki pooja ki prathmik vidhi kya hai?
assistant: Devi ki pooja 'Hrim' bija mantra ke saath shuru karni chahiye, aur pooja se pehle Karanyasa aur Pranayama karna anivarya bataya gaya hai.

user: Gyani purush gyan kaise prapt karte hain?
assistant: Jo log pavitra swabhav ke hote hain, woh ya toh siddhanton (principles) ke chintan se ya phir nishkam karma karke gyan hasil karte hain.

user: Kya khane par control karne se moksha mil sakta hai?
assistant: Brahmajnana (self-realization) ke bina moksha pana namumkin hai. Insaan chahe kitna hi khane-peene par niyantran kar le, jab tak use atma-gyan nahi hota, woh mukt nahi ho sakta.

user: Atma ke bandhan ke baare mein kya darshan diya gaya hai?
assistant: Atma hamesha se mukt hai aur kabhi kisi bandhan mein nahi hoti. Bandhan ka vichar sirf un logo ko hota hai jinki buddhi misguided ya bhramit hoti hai.

user: Advaita Vedanta mein 'Ekam Evadvitiyam' ka kya matlab hai?
assistant: Iska arth hai ki satya sirf ek hi hai aur uske jaisa dusra koi nahi hai. Yeh parambrahma ki non-duality ko darshata hai.

user: Insaan ko 'Om Tat Sat' aur 'So'ham' mantra ka upyog kaise karna chahiye?
assistant: Insaan ko hamesha 'Om Tat Sat' ka jaap karna chahiye aur 'So'ham Asmi' (Main wahi hoon) ka dhyan karte hue vairagya ke saath apne saare karm karne chahiye.

user: Ek jeevanmukt rishi ki dincharya aur swabhav kaisa hota hai?
assistant: Woh rishi hamesha Atma ke chintan mein khush rehta hai. Use dukh ya moh nahi hota, uska koi pakka ghar nahi hota aur woh bina kisi sandeh ya hinsa ke shanti se rehta hai.

user: Nath parampara mein 'Nirvana Tat' ke saath akele vicharan karne ka gūḍh arth kya hai?
assistant: Iska arth hai ki saadhak ko Nirvana-Brahma tattva ke aadhar par nivrutti marg (renunciation) par chalna chahiye. Jab mann pawan ke sahare sthir ho jaata hai aur saadhak apni surati ko jagrit kar leta hai, tab woh sansarik bandhano se mukt hokar aatma-tattva mein akela hi rama rehta hai.

user: Is Sanskrit/Hindi text mein 'Suvrata' ka kya matlab hai?
assistant: Text mein 'Suvrata' unhe kaha gaya hai jo acche vows ya niyam ka palan karte hain. Ye unhe address karne ke liye use kiya gaya hai.

user: Pratima ke mahapeethasthan ko lekar kya dosh bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Text ke anusar, agar koi 'asprishya' (untouchable) kisi idol ya pratima ke mahapeethasthan ko touch karta hai, toh use ek 'dosha' ya transgression mana jata hai.

user: Kya Lord Shiva ke Linga form ke liye bhi touch ke rules same hain?
assistant: Nahi, text mein clear differentiation hai. Maheshwar (Lord Shiva) jab 'Linga' ke roop mein hote hain, toh unhe touch karne se koi 'dosha' nahi lagta, chahe touch karne wala koi bhi ho.

user: Is specific verse ka number kya hai jo translation mein mention kiya gaya tha?
assistant: Ye poora context verse number 21 (॥ २१ ॥) se liya gaya hai.

user: Is text ka main message kya hai purity aur touch ko lekar?
assistant: Main message ye hai ki normal idols ke pedestal ke mukable Shiva Linga mein touch ko lekar koi restrictive fault ya 'dosha' nahi hota.

user: Agar koi vyakti bina kisi fixed time ya profit ke agreement ke property invest karta hai, toh shastron ke hisab se kya hota hai?
assistant: Verse 129 ke anusar, agar koi manav labh ki asha se sthavar (immovable) ya asthavar sampatti lagata hai aur samay ya profit ka koi niyam tai nahi hai, toh woh transaction asiddh yaani invalid ho sakta hai.

user: Kya kisi representative ya dhoot ko uske malik ki galti ki saza mil sakti hai?
assistant: Nahi, Verse 127 yeh batata hai ki yeh ek sanatan vidhi hai ki niyokta (employer) dwara kiye gaye dosh ke liye uska pratinidhi (representative) ya dhoot dand ka bhagi nahi hota.

user: Karz, kheti aur vyapar jaise kaamon mein kis tarah ka aacharan karna chahiye?
assistant: Verse 128 ke mutabik, rin (debt), krishi (farming), aur vanijya (commerce) mein jo bhi niyam logon ke beech tai hue hain aur jo dharma ke anusar hain, unka palan waise hi kiya jana chahiye.

user: Yogion ne Kalshakti ka rang kala (Krishna varn) kyun bataya hai?
assistant: Verse 6 ke anusar, Kalshakti nirguna aur nirakara hai. Yogarudh logon ke hit ke liye aur dhyan ke liye unka rang kala nirupit kiya gaya hai kyunki woh sansar ka kalyan karne wali hain.

user: Kalshakti ke lalat (forehead) par chandrama ka chinha hone ka kya karan hai?
assistant: Verse 7 explains ki woh nitya, avinashi aur mangalmayi hain. Unke amrit-swaroop hone ki wajah se unke lalat par chandrama ki kala ko kalpit kiya gaya hai.

user: Bhagwati ke teen netra (three eyes) kis cheez ko darshate hain?
assistant: Verse 8 ke anusar, Bhagwati Surya, Chandra aur Agni roopi teen netron se is poore jagat ko dekhti hain jo samay (kaal) se utpann hua hai. Isiliye unke teen netra mane gaye hain.

user: Maheshwari ke lal vastra ka kya mahatva bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Verse 9 mein bataya gaya hai ki woh kaal ke kram mein sabhi praniyon ko apne danton se chabati hain. Un sabhi praniyon ka rudhir (blood) hi un Maheshwari ka lal vastra kahlata hai.

user: Brahma marriage ki kya conditions hoti hain aur ise flawless kyon mana jata hai?
assistant: Brahma marriage tab flawless maani jati hai jab woh same caste (varna) mein ho, lekin ladka-ladki ka gotra alag ho. Saath hi, ladki mother ki side se 'sapinda' (blood relation) nahi honi chahiye aur saari ceremonies family customs yaani Kuladharma ke hisaab se honi chahiye.

user: Ghar mein Brahma marriage se aayi patni ka kya sthaan hota hai?
assistant: Brahma marriage se aayi hui stree hi asli 'Patni' aur 'Griheshwari' (house mistress) कहलाती hai. Bina uski marzi ya consent ke, husband doosri Brahma marriage perform nahi kar sakta.

user: Wealth inheritance ke maamle mein Brahma marriage aur Shaiva marriage ke bachon mein kya fark hai?
assistant: Inheritance rules ke mutabiq, jab tak Brahma marriage se paida hua beta ya uski lineage ka koi member maujood hai, tab tak Shaiva marriage se paida hua beta wealth ka haqdaar (heir) nahi ho sakta.

user: Shaiva marriage mein 'chakra' ritual ka kya mahatva hai aur husband kab alag ho sakta hai?
assistant: Shaiva marriage bachon ki prapti ke liye chakra rules ke under ki jati hai. Fertile period observe karne ke baad, jab chakra ritual ka time khatam ho jata hai, tab husband us stree ko chhod sakta hai.

user: Anuloma aur Viloma Shaiva marriage se paida huye bachon ki caste kaise decide hoti hai?
assistant: Anuloma marriage (groom ki caste higher ho) mein bacha apni mother ki caste ka hota hai. Lekin Viloma marriage (bride ki caste higher ho) mein bacha 'panchamavarna' yaani ek common caste ka mana jata hai.

user: Wells, ponds aur temples ki 'Pratishtha' ke waqt kaun-kaun se rituals zaroori hote hain?
assistant: Vapi, kupa (wells), ponds, idols aur houses ki consecration ke waqt Panchadevata aur Matrikas ki puja karni chahiye. Iske saath hi Vasordhara, Vriddhishraddha aur Kushakandika rituals perform karna compulsory hota hai.

user: Kya streeyon ke liye religious rituals mein Vriddhishraddha allowed hai?
assistant: Nahi, streeyon ke liye prescribed duties mein Vriddhishraddha ka provision nahi hai. Halanki, unhe Devtaon aur Pitron (ancestors) ki tripti ke liye food offering yaani 'bhojya' ka utsarg zaroor karna chahiye.

user: Dvijatiyon ke liye Upavita sanskar ka kya mahatva hai?
assistant: Upavita ya Upanayana sanskar ek baar sampann hone par hi Dvijati log Daiva (Devon) aur Pitrya (Pitron) se jude dharmik karyon ke liye adhikaari ya eligible bante hain.

user: Upanayana sanskar kis ayu mein hona chahiye aur iski limit kya hai?
assistant: Garbh se aathvein saal ki umar mein balak ka Upanayana hona chahiye. Agar solah saal beet chuke hain, toh phir yeh sanskar nahi kiya ja sakta aur woh balak dev ya pitru karma ke liye yogya nahi rehta.

user: Guru shishya ko Gayatri mantra ki diksha dene ki pratikriya kaise shuru karte hain?
assistant: Guru shishya ke dahine kaan (right ear) mein teen baar 'Om' (Pranava) sunate hain, phir teen vyahriti 'Bhūr Bhuvaḥ Svaḥ' ka uchcharan karke Gayatri mantra ka updesh dete hain.

user: Savitri ya Gayatri mantra ke Rishi aur Chhanda ke baare mein batayein.
assistant: Is mantra ke Rishi Sadashiva hain aur iska Chhanda Trishtubh hai. Iski adhishtatri Devi Savitri hain aur iska viniyog Moksha prapti ke liye kiya jata hai.

user: Gayatri mantra ka sahi uchcharan kram (sequence) kya hai?
assistant: Sabse pehle 'Tat Savituḥ', phir 'Vareṇyam', uske baad 'Bhargaḥ' aur phir 'Devasya Dhīmahi' bolna chahiye. Anth mein 'Dhiyo yo naḥ prachodayāt' ka uchcharan kiya jata hai.

user: Gayatri mantra ke poore hone ke baad Guru ka kya kartavya hota hai?
assistant: Mantra uchcharan ke baad Guru ko dubara Pranava (Om) bolna hota hai aur uske baad shishya ko Gayatri mantra ka gehra arth samjhana chahiye.

user: Verse 218 ke anusar yogi kis prakar ki jyoti ka dhyan karte hain?
assistant: Yogi us antar-jyoti (inner light) ka dhyan karte hain jo Brahman swaroop hai. Yeh jyoti param satya, sarvavyapi aur sanatan hai.

user: Gayatri mantra mein 'Bharga' se hamari buddhi aur mann ke liye kya prarthna ki gayi hai?
assistant: Prarthna yeh hai ki woh sarvasakshi Ishwar (Bharga) hamare mann, buddhi aur indriyon ko Dharma, Artha, Kama aur Moksha ke marg par prerit kare.

user: Mahanirvana Tantra ke anusar, agar ritual mein koi galti ya 'pramada' ho jaye toh usse kaise thik kiya jata hai?
assistant: Ritual mein hui kisi bhi kami ya galti ko thik karne ke liye Lord Brahma ka man mein dhyan karna chahiye. Phir Maya Bija aur 'Svaha' ke saath oblation (ahuti) deni chahiye taaki sab kuch 'Svishtakritam' yaani perfect ho jaye.

user: Yajna ke dauran 'Sruk' aur 'Sruva' ka upyog kaise bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Yajna mein 'Sruk' naamak patra (vessel) ke zariye 'Sruva' se ghee (ghrit) liya jata hai. Iske baad Brahma ji ka smaran karte hue Maya Bija ke saath mantra padhkar ahuti di jati hai.

user: Agni Dev ko yajna mein kin visheshanon se sambodhit kiya gaya hai?
assistant: Agni ko sabhi lokon ka pavitra karne wala (purifier), yajna ka sakshi (witness), aur kshemakartta (well-being dene wala) kaha gaya hai. Woh sabhi manokamnaon ko poora karne wale Prabhu hain.

user: Agni ko ahuti dete waqt kis mantra aur bija ka upyog kiya jata hai?
assistant: Agni ko ahuti dete waqt pehle Maya Bija 'Hrim' ka uchcharan hota hai, phir Agni ki stuti ka mantra, aur ant mein 'Svaha' bolkar ahuti di jati hai.

user: Chandra (Soma) ko ahuti dene ki kya vidhi bataya gayi hai?
assistant: Mahanirvana Tantra ke anusar, Chandrama ka dhyan karke 'Shiva' naam ki agni mein saat (7) baar ahuti deni chahiye. Yeh vidhi puri tarah Soma yaani Moon god ko samarpit hoti hai.

user: Surya Dev ke 'Taccaksur' mantra ka arth kya hai?
assistant: Is mantra ka arth hai ki hum us divya Surya ko, jo devtaon ke liye bhi hitkari hai aur purab se uday hota hai, sau (100) varshon tak dekhte rahein aur sau varshon tak jeevit rahein.

user: Surya darshan ke baad ghar lautkar pita ko kya kartavya poora karna chahiye?
assistant: Surya darshan karwane ke baad pita ko apne ghar lautna chahiye. Wahan Surya ko Arghya (water offering) dene ke baad apne parivar aur kinsmen (svajanan) ko bhojan karana chahiye.

user: Shloka 270 ke mutabik Atman ka dhyan lagane ka sahi tarika kya hai?
assistant: Shloka 270 ke anusar, vyakti ko poore brahmand ko—Brahma se lekar ek tinke tak—ek hi Satya (Reality) ka roop maanna chahiye. Use saare naam aur roop (forms) bhool kar apne andar hi Atman ka dhyan karna chahiye.

user: Ek Sannyasi ke mukhya lakshan kya bataye gaye hain?
assistant: Verse 271 ke mutabik, ek Sannyasi ko be-ghar (homeless), kshamavaan, nidar aur har tarah ke lagav (attachment) se mukt hona chahiye. Usme 'main' aur 'mera' ki bhawna ya ego bilkul nahi honi chahiye.

user: Kya Sannyasi ko shastron ke niyam aur vidhi-vidhan maanne zaroori hain?
assistant: Nahi, Verse 272 kehta hai ki ek Atman ko jaanne wala Sannyasi shastron ke vidhi-nishedh (rules and prohibitions) se mukt hota hai. Woh sukh-dukh mein ek jaisa rehta hai aur cheezon ko paane ya bachane ki chinta nahi karta.

user: Mushkil waqt mein ek sthir buddhi wale vyakti ka swabhav kaisa hota hai?
assistant: Verse 273 ke anusar, aisa vyakti dukh aane par bhi sthir rehta hai aur sukh milne par lalchi nahi hota. Woh hamesha anand mein, pavitra aur shant rehta hai.

user: Ek gyani vyakti ko doosre praniyon ke prati kaisa vyavhar rakhna chahiye?
assistant: Verse 274 batata hai ki use hamesha sabhi praniyon ke bhale (welfare) ke liye taiyar rehna chahiye. Use kisi ke mann mein dukh ya agitation paida nahi karni chahiye aur gusse se door rehna chahiye.

user: Shareer aur Atman ke sambandh ko kis misaal se samjhaya gaya hai?
assistant: Verse 275 mein kaha gaya hai ki jaise yeh jhoothi duniya Paramatma ke sahare sach lagti hai, waise hi yeh nashvar shareer Atman ke sahare hi chalta hai. Is gyan ko paakar insaan sukhi ho jata hai.

user: Jab shareer koi kaam karta hai, toh Atman ki sthiti kya hoti hai?
assistant: Verse 278 ke mutabik, saare kaam sirf indriyan (senses) hi karti hain. Atman toh bas ek sakshi (witness) hai jo bilkul unattached rehta hai. Is sacchai ko jaanne wala hi moksha paata hai.

user: Sannyas marg mein kin cheezon ka tyag karna anivarya hai?
assistant: Verse 279 ke anusar, Sannyasi ko dhaatu (metals) lena, doosron ki ninda karna, jhooth bolna, aurton ke saath khelna aur jalan (envy) jaisi baaton se poori tarah door rehna chahiye.

user: Kya sirf pooja aur jap karne se mukti mil sakti hai?
assistant: Verse 287 mein Devi ko bataya gaya hai ki bina Brahmajnana (Knowledge of Brahman) aur karmo ke tyag ke, chahe koi saalo tak pooja-path kare, use mukti nahi mil sakti.

user: Kula Avadhuta ki pehchan kya hai aur unka samman kaise karna chahiye?
assistant: Verse 288 kehta hai ki Kula Avadhuta insaan ke roop mein 'Jivanmukta' hote hain. Ek grahastha (householder) ko unhe sakshat Narayan maan kar unki pooja karni chahiye.

user: Hindu dharm ke 10 mukhya sanskar kaunse hain?
assistant: Verse 4 ke mutabik, Garbhadhana se lekar Vivaha tak 10 sanskar hote hain, jinmein Pumsavana, Simantonnayana, Jatakarma, Namakarana, Nishkramana, Annaprashana, Chudakarana aur Upanayana shamil hain.

user: Dvijati aur Shudron ke sanskaro mein kya antar bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Verse 5 ke anusar, Shudron ke liye Upanayana (sacred thread) sanskar nahi hota, isliye unke liye sirf 9 sanskar hain, jabki Dvija jatiyon ke liye pure 10 sanskar bataye gaye hain.

user: Shlok 264 ke anusar, ek 'mahaprajna' yaani buddhiman vyakti ki asli pehchan kya batayi gayi hai?
assistant: Is shlok ke mutabik, woh vyakti khud hi 'Brahma' ka swaroop hai, aur use isi gyan ko pehchanna chahiye.

user: Is spiritual context mein kin do mukhya shabdon par dhyan ya manan (contemplation) karne ki salaah di gayi hai?
assistant: Shlok mein 'Hansa' aur 'Soham' ke upar chinta aur manan karne ko kaha gaya hai.

user: Insaan ko apne swabhav mein se kin cheezon ka tyag karne ke liye kaha gaya hai?
assistant: Insaan ko apne andar se ahankar (ego) aur mamta (attachment) ko puri tarah se chhodne ki baat kahi gayi hai.

user: Ahankar aur mamta ko chhodne ka parinaam ya result kya bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Jab koi in cheezon ko chhod deta hai, toh woh bina kisi bojh ke is sansar mein bade sukh aur shanti se vicharan (wander) kar sakta hai.

user: Shlok 225 ke mutabik, ek sadhak ko ghar tyagte waqt kis tarah ki mansik sthiti (mental state) mein hona chahiye?
assistant: Shlok 225 ke anusaar, sadhak ko ghar se nikalne se pehle apne saare worldly duties poore kar lene chahiye aur apne rishtedaron ko santusht (satisfied) karna chahiye. Usse mamatārahita (attachment-free), kamana-rahit (desireless) aur apni indriyon par kaabu (jitendriya) paakar hi bahar nikalna chahiye.

user: Grihastha ashram chhodne se pehle sadhak ko kin logo se ijazat leni chahiye?
assistant: Verse 226 batata hai ki jo vyakti Grihastha ashram chhodna chahta hai, usse apne sage-sambandhiyon, doston, padosiyon aur gaon waalo ko bulakar bade prem ke saath unse jaane ki anumati (permission) maangni chahiye.

user: Sabse permission lene ke baad, ghar se nikalne ka antim process kya bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Shlok 227 ke hisaab se, sabse ijazat lene ke baad sadhak ko apne Ishta-devata ko pranaam karna chahiye. Phir gaon ki pradakshina (circumambulation) karke ek nirapekṣa (detached) mann ke saath hamesha ke liye ghar se bahar nikal jaana chahiye.

user: Kya shastron ke mutabik bina vivah ke Shakti ki upasana karna sahi hai?
assistant: Nahi, shastron ke anusar agar koi Vira (practitioner) bina vivah ke Shakti ki puja karta hai, toh use vyabhichar ya adultery ka paap lagta hai. Isme koi shak nahi hai.

user: Bhairavi Chakra ke dauran jati-paati (caste) ka kya niyam hota hai?
assistant: Bhairavi Chakra shuru hote hi sabhi varna (castes) ek saman ya 'dwija' (twice-born) mane jate hain. Lekin jaise hi ritual khatam hota hai, sabhi log apni asli jati mein wapas laut jate hain.

user: Chakra ritual ke beech mein kin baaton ka parhez karna chahiye?
assistant: Chakra ke andar baith kar faltu baatein (idle chatter), bechaini, thukna, gas pass karna ya kisi ki jati ke baare mein baat karna sakht mana hai.

user: Kaise logon ko Chakra se bahar nikal dena chahiye?
assistant: Jo log kroor (cruel), dusht, pashu-pravriti wale, nastik (unbelievers), ya Kula shastron ki ninda karte hain, unhe Chakra se turant dur kar dena chahiye.

user: Agar koi Vira kisi 'Pashu' insaan ko Chakra mein le aaye toh kya anjaam hota hai?
assistant: Agar koi sadhak darr ya moh ki wajah se kisi 'Pashu' (animalistic person) ko ritual mein shamil karta hai, toh woh Kuladharma se bhatak jata hai aur narak ka bhagi banta hai.

user: Chakra mein maujood logon ko kiske niyam follow karne chahiye?
assistant: Jab tak practitioners Chakra mein hain, unhe Lord Shiva (Shambhu) ke bataye hue code of conduct aur aadeshon ka hi palan karna chahiye.

user: Kali Yuga mein Kuladharma ko chupane par kya saja milti hai?
assistant: Jab Kali Yuga ka prabhav badh jata hai, tab agar koi Kaula (tradition follower) apne Kuladharma ko chupata hai, toh use narak mein rehna padta hai.

user: Tattva Chakra ke liye kis tarah ke log qualify karte hain?
assistant: Tattva Chakra ke liye sirf wahi log yogya hain jo compassionate hain, jinke irade nek hain, aur jo bina kisi shak ke Brahman ki bhakti mein pakke hain.

user: Tattva Chakra ki upasana mein ritualistic pots ka kya mahatva hai?
assistant: Is practice mein ghada (ritual pot) sthapit karne ki ya bahut zyada dikhawe wali puja ki zaroorat nahi hoti. Isme har jagah Brahman ke sath ek hone ka bhav rakhna hi kafi hai.

user: Tattva Chakra karne se insaan ko kya milta hai?
assistant: Jo sadhak poore man se Tattva Chakra karte hain, unhe charon Purusharthas—Dharma, Artha, Kama aur Moksha—ki prapti hoti hai.

user: Chakra ka swami (ritual leader) Tattvas ke sath kya karta hai?
assistant: Chakra ka swami apne saathi sadhakon ke sath baithkar sabhi 'Tattvas' (ritual elements) ko samne rakhta hai aur unhe dhyan se arrange karta hai.

user: Tattvas ko abhimantrit karne ke liye kaun sa mantra kitni baar japna chahiye?
assistant: Chakra leader ko 'Om Hamsah' (Tara se lekar Prana Bija tak) mantra ka 100 baar jap karke un Tattvas ke upar recite karna chahiye.

user: Shastron ke mutabiq kisi mushkil kaam ko siddh karne ya dushmano se nipatne ka sahi tareeka kya bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Shastron ke anusar, kisi bhi karya ko poora karne ya dushmano ke saath yuddh aur sandhi karne ke liye 'Upaya' yani sahi strategy ka istemal karna chahiye. Strategy se kiye gaye kaamo se hi vijay, samriddhi aur mangal naseeb hota hai.

user: Ek buddhiman vyakti ko apni sangati aur mushkil waqt mein kaisa aacharan rakhna chahiye?
assistant: Vyakti ko hamesha vidvaan logon ka priya hona chahiye aur neech logon ki sangati se door rehna chahiye. Mushkil waqt (adversity) mein insaan ko dhairya aur kushal banna chahiye, saath hi apne kharchon par niyantran rakhna chahiye.

user: Sainya sanchalan aur kilebandi ke maamle mein ek neta mein kaun si nipun-ta honi chahiye?
assistant: Ek neta ko kilon ki dekh-rekh aur marammat (fortification) mein mahir hona chahiye. Use shastron ki shiksha ka pura gyan hona chahiye, apni sena ke manobala (morale) ko pehchanna chahiye aur unhe yuddh-kaushal sikhana chahiye.

user: Raj-kaaj aur nyay ke mamle mein bharose ko lekar kya hidayat di gayi hai?
assistant: Raja ko kabhi bhi kisi ek vyakti par aankh moond kar bharosa nahi karna chahiye aur na hi nyay (justice) ka pura kaam kisi ek insaan ko saunpna chahiye. Iske saath hi, neech logon ke saath zyada ghulna-milna ya mazaak karne se bachna chahiye.

user: Ek gyaani raja ko apne bolne ke tareeke aur saza dete waqt kaisa vyavhaar karna chahiye?
assistant: Raja ko gyaani hone ke bawajood kam bolna chahiye aur hamesha seekhne ki ichha (inquisitive) rakhni chahiye. Usey samman milne par ghamand nahi karna chahiye aur saza ya inaam dete waqt hamesha sthir aur gambhir rehna chahiye.

user: Kya kisi raja ko gusse ya jaldbaazi mein koi faisla lena chahiye?
assistant: Bilkul nahi. Ek samajhdaar raja ko kabhi bhi gusse, ghamand ya laparwahi mein aakar kisi ko jaldi mein sammanit nahi karna chahiye aur na hi kisi ko saza deni chahiye.

user: Vaishya varg ke liye vyapaar aur kheti mein kin buraiyon ko tyagna zaroori bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Vaishyon ka yeh kartavya hai ki woh apne vyapaar aur kheti ke kaam mein laparwahi (negligence), buri aadaton, alas, jhooth aur dhokhadhari ko poori tarah se chhod dein.

user: Kanooni taur par kin logon dwara kiya gaya sauda ya daan amanya (invalid) mana jata hai?
assistant: Agar koi vyakti nasha ki halat mein ho, pagal ho, baccha ho, dushman ka bandi ho ya bimaari ki wajah se jiski buddhi theek na ho—unke dwara kiya gaya koi bhi daan ya sauda invalid mana jata hai.

user: Bina dekhi gayi cheezon ki kharidari (purchase) kab valid mani jati hai aur kab radd ho jati hai?
assistant: Bina dekhi cheez ka sauda uske bataye gaye gunon (description) par tika hota hai. Agar cheez nikalne par woh bataye gaye gunon ke mutabiq nahi hoti, toh woh kharidari radd mani jati hai.

user: Haathi, ghode aur oont jaise jaanwaro ke saude mein chhupa hua dosh pata chalne par kya niyam hai?
assistant: In jaanwaro ke maamle mein agar koi chhupa hua dosh (hidden defect) samne aata hai, toh sauda ek saal beetne ke baad bhi cancel kiya ja sakta hai.

user: Anaaj aur nagad (cash) loan par saalana byaaj (interest) ki kya dar tai ki gayi hai?
assistant: Gehu, jau aur anaaj jaise loan par mool-dhan ka chautha hissa (25%) byaaj lagta hai, jabki nagad ya dhatu-mudra ke loan par mool ka aathwan hissa (12.5%) saalana byaaj dene ka niyam hai.

user: Seva karne wale vyakti (servant) mein kaun se gun hone chahiye aur unhe vachanon ko lekar kya karna chahiye?
assistant: Seva karne wale vyakti ko kushal, saaf-suthra, sach bolne wala aur alas-mukt hona chahiye. Shastron ke mutabiq, vyapaar, kheti ya karz ko lekar jo bhi waada kiya gaya ho, usey poora karna har insaan ka farz hai.

user: Ek sevak ko apne swami ke samne galti hone par kaisa bartav karna chahiye?
assistant: Agar sevak se koi galti ho jaye toh usey apne swami se maafi maangni chahiye. Use apne malik ke samne kabhi bhi dhitai, ghamand ya badtameezi nahi dikhani chahiye.

user: Bhairavi Chakra aur Tattva Chakra jaise Tantric anushthanon mein jati-paati ke niyam kaise badal jate hain?
assistant: Aam taur par log apni hi jati mein vivah aur khana-pina karte hain, lekin Bhairavi aur Tattva Chakra ke dauran koi varna-bhed nahi rehta. Wahan 'Shaiva marriage' ki ijazat hoti hai aur sab ek saath milkar khate-peete hain.

user: Agar koi moksha chahta hai aur Sandhya ka sahi samay nikal jaye, toh use kya karna chahiye?
assistant: Moksha ki ichha rakhne waale vyakti ko agar Sandhya ka samay beet jaye, toh 'Om Tat Sat Brahma' mantra ka uccharan karke Tantrik aur Vaidik Sandhya kar leni chahiye. Bas dhyan rahe ki distress ya aaturta ki sthiti mein koi kade niyam nahi hote.

user: Shastron ke hisaab se 'Puṇyakāla' yaani shubh samay kaun-kaun se hote hain?
assistant: Puṇyakāla mein mahine, saal aur paksha ka pehla din shamil hai. Iske alawa Chaturdashi, Ashtami, Shukla Paksha ki Ekadashi aur Amavasya ko bhi punyakari maana jaata hai.

user: Kya vyakti ka apna janm din ya mata-pita se jude din bhi shubh maane jaate hain?
assistant: Haan, bilkul. Apna khud ka birthday (janm din), mata-pita ki punyatithi (death anniversary), aur khaas astronomical events ya festivals ko bhi 'Puṇyakāla' yaani shubh samay kaha gaya hai.

user: Agar koi vyakti apne ghar ki zimmedariyan chhod kar teerth yatra par jaata hai, toh uska kya parinaam hota hai?
assistant: Agar koi apni padhai (svādhyāya), mata-pita ki seva aur patni ki raksha jaise zaroori kartavyon ko chhod kar teerth jaata hai, toh woh yatra uske liye punyakari nahi balki narak ka kaaran ban jaati hai.

user: Purane granthon ke mutabiq ek stri ko jeevan ke alag-alag padaav par kiske sanrakshan mein rehna chahiye?
assistant: Shlok ke anusar, ek stri ko bachpan mein apne pita ke vash mein, jawani mein pati ke paas aur budhape mein pati ke bhandhu-bandhavon ya beton ki dekh-rekh mein rehna chahiye; use swatantra rehne ki salaah nahi di gayi hai.

user: Shaadi se pehle ek ladki ko kin baaton ka gyan hona zaroori bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Pita ko aisi ladki ka vivah nahi karna chahiye jise pati ki maryada, pati ki seva karne ka tareeka aur Dharma ke niyam ya shasan ka pata na ho. In baaton ka gyan hona marriage ke liye anivarya hai.

user: Bhojan ke mamle mein kin cheezon ka maans khana varjit yaani mana bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Insaani maans, bandar jaise narakriti pashuon ka maans, bohot upkaari gaay (cow) ka maans aur giddh jaise maans-khane waale janwaron ka maans khane ki sakht manaahi hai.

user: Kya saadharan varnon ke log apni rozi-roti ke liye koi bhi kaam chun sakte hain?
assistant: Granth ke anusar, saadharan varnon ke log apni dehayatra yaani guzaare ke liye Brahmin ke peshe (vṛtti) ko chhod kar baaki kisi bhi profession ko apna sakte hain.

user: Ek Brahmin ke charitra mein kaun-se gun hona zaroori bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Ek Brahmin ko hamesha dvesh-rahit (free from malice), moh-maya se door, shant, satyavadi aur indriyon ko kabu mein rakhne wala hona chahiye. Use bina kisi kapat ya jalan ke apna kaam karna chahiye.

user: Mahanirvana Tantra ke hisaab se aise kaunse samajik kaam hain jinse insaan teenon lokon par vijay pa sakta hai?
assistant: Shastra ke anusar, jo vyakti talaab khudwaata hai, ped lagwaata hai, raaste mein sarai (rest houses) banwaata hai aur pulon (bridges) ka nirmaan karta hai, woh apne punya se teenon lokon ko jeet leta hai.

user: Ek insaan ko apne mata-pita aur doston ke saath kaisa rishta rakhna chahiye taaki use punyaphala mile?
assistant: Agar kisi vyakti se uske mata-pita hamesha santusht rehte hain, uske dost usse prem karte hain aur duniya uske acche kaamo ka yash gaati hai, toh samajh lijiye usne teenon lokon par vijay pa li hai.

user: Mahanirvana Tantra mein sachai aur indriyon (senses) par control ke baare mein kya kaha gaya hai?
assistant: Wahan bataya gaya hai ki jiska sankalp sirf satya bolna hai, jo garibon par hamesha daya karta hai aur jisne apne kaam (lust) aur krodh (anger) par kabu paa liya hai, wahi asli vijeta hai.

user: Dusron ki sampatti aur parayi striyon ke prati ek dharmi purush ka rawaiya kaisa hona chahiye?
assistant: Ek dharmi purush wahi hai jo par-striyon se dur rahe, dusron ki cheezon ki lalach na kare aur jiske mann mein na toh dikhawa (hypocrisy) ho aur na hi jalan (envy).

user: Dharmayuddha mein ladne waale yoddha ko kya phal milta hai?
assistant: Jo yoddha yuddh ke maidan se bhagta nahi hai aur bina dare dharm ki raksha ke liye ladta hai, ya ladte huye apne praan tyag deta hai, use teenon lokon ki vijay ka punya milta hai.

user: Shashtron ke mutabik baatcheet karne ka sahi tarika kya hai?
assistant: Insaan ko hamesha sach, namra, priya aur dusron ka bhala karne waali baatein hi bolni chahiye. Apni tareef khud karna aur dusron ki ninda (slander) karna bilkul galat hai.

user: Shaivachar aur Mahadev ke shasan ka palan karne waale ke kya lakshan hote hain?
assistant: Aisa vyakti jiska mann sanshay (doubt) se mukt hai, jisme gehri shraddha hai aur jo Lord Shiva ke bataye huye raaste par chalta hai, wahi teenon lokon ko jeetne ka adhikaari hai.

user: Ek disciplined grihastha (householder) ko apne lifestyle mein kaunse gun apnane chahiye?
assistant: Use apni indriyon par control rakhna chahiye, hamesha khush rehna chahiye, soch-samajh kar kaam karna chahiye aur door-darshi (farsighted) hona chahiye.

user: Bade-buzurgon ke saamne baithne aur bolne ke kya niyam bataye gaye hain?
assistant: Respectable logon ke saamne hamesha naap-tol kar bolna chahiye aur unke paas baith kar kabhi bhi zor-zor se ya bina wajah nahi hasna chahiye.

user: Yoga-Kshema ka arth kya hai aur ek grihastha ke liye iska kya mahatva hai?
assistant: Yoga ka matlab hai nayi cheezon ko hasil karna aur Kshema ka matlab hai unki raksha karna. Ek grihastha ko hamesha apne parivaar ki samridhi aur unki suraksha (welfare and security) ke liye samarpit rehna chahiye.

user: Gyani purush duniya ke kaam karte waqt apna nazariya kaisa rakhta hai?
assistant: Ek gyani purush dushman aur dost dono ko ek hi nazar (equal vision) se dekhta hai aur sirf duniya ke bhale ke liye apne saare kaam karta hai.

user: Bahaari shuddhata (external purification) ke liye kaunse padarth sabse acche maane gaye hain?
assistant: Purification ke liye yagya ki raakh (ash) se nahaana sabse uttam hai. Iske alawa saaf mitti, pavitra kapde aur mrig-charm (deerskin) ko bhi shuddh maana gaya hai.

user: Insaan ko kab-kab bahaari shauch (cleansing) karna anivarya hai?
assistant: Sone ke baad, physical relation ke baad, toilet jaane ke baad, khana khaane ke baad ya kisi gandagi ko chhune par bahaari shauch karna zaroori hota hai.

user: Sandhya aur Puja karne ka sahi samay aur sequence kya bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Din mein teen baar (morning, noon, evening) Vedic aur Tantric dono tarah ki Sandhya karni chahiye. Puja hamesha vidhi-vidhan ke hisaab se hi honi chahiye.

user: Daily rituals mein mantra ka jaap (Japa) kitni baar karna chahiye?
assistant: Rules ke mutabik Japa ya toh 1008 baar, ya 108 baar, ya kam se kam 10 baar karna chahiye.

user: Vedic Sandhya ka mukhya maqsad kya hai?
assistant: Vedic Sandhya ka ek mukhya uddeshya Dvijatiyo (twice-born) aur Shudron ke beech bhed ya pehchan ko banaye rakhna bataya gaya hai.

user: Agar koi vyakti Sandhya ka samay bhool jaye ya late ho jaye, toh use kya karna chahiye?
assistant: Aise mein vyakti ko 'Om Tat Sat Brahma' mantra ka uchcharan karke apni Tantric aur Vedic Sandhya puri kar leni chahiye.

user: Ghar ki safayi aur household items ko lekar kya salah di gayi hai?
assistant: Ghar ke bartan, bistar, kapde aur rehne ki jagah jitni zyada saaf aur nirmal hogi, utna hi wo insaan ke liye accha aur shubh maana jayega.

user: Insaan ko apni life mein kin cheezon ko earn karne par focus karna chahiye aur kise avoid karna chahiye?
assistant: Insaan ko hamesha mehnat se vidya (knowledge), dhan (wealth), yash (fame) aur dharma (righteousness) ko acquire karne ki koshish karni chahiye. Iske saath hi, bure vyasan (addictions), galat logon ki sangati (wicked company) aur jhoothi dushmani ya dhokhebazi ko puri tarah chhod dena chahiye.

user: Koi bhi bada kaam karne se pehle situation aur timing ko dekhna kyun zaroori hai?
assistant: Insaan ki saari koshishein (efforts) situation ke hisaab se hoti hain aur saare actions sahi waqt (time) par depend karte hain. Isliye, koi bhi decision lene ya kaam karne se pehle avastha (condition) aur sahi samay ko acchi tarah parkhna bahut zaroori hota hai.

user: Ek ideal householder (grihastha) ka apne relatives aur elders ke prati kaisa behavior hona chahiye?
assistant: Ek householder ko apne relatives ke liye loving aur supportive hona chahiye aur hamesha family ke well-being (Yoga aur Kshema) ka dhyan rakhna chahiye. Specially, bade-bujurgon aur respected logon ke saamne humesha measured words (kam bolna) ka use karna chahiye aur bina wajah zyada nahi hasna chahiye.

user: Mental peace aur sahi decision-making ke liye kaunse qualities develop karni chahiye?
assistant: Sahi raste par chalne ke liye insaan ko Jitendriya (senses par control) hona chahiye aur man ko shant (tranquil) rakhna chahiye. Iske saath hi, vigilence aur farsightedness (doorandeshi) honi chahiye taaki bina soche-samajhe indriyon ke behkaave mein aakar koi galat kaam na ho jaye.

user: Mahanirvana Tantra ke hisaab se Kali Yuga mein kounse ashrams prescribe kiye gaye hain?
assistant: Mahanirvana Tantra ke mutabiq, Kali Yuga mein sirf do hi ashrams valid hain: Gārhasthya (householder life) aur Bhaikṣuka (renunciate life). Is age mein traditional Brahmacharya aur Vanaprastha ashrams ka palan nahi hota.

user: Kya Kali Yuga mein householders sirf rituals perform karke siddhi prapt kar sakte hain?
assistant: Nahi, shastra kehta hai ki sirf Agamas mein batayi gayi ritualistic methods par depend karke householders ko siddhi ya spiritual perfection nahi mil sakti.

user: Bhaikṣuka ashram mein rehne waalo ke liye Vedic rules mein kya badlav bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Kali Yuga mein renunciates (Bhaikṣuka) ke liye staff (danda) dharan karne ki Vedic vidhi applicable nahi hai, kyunki yeh ek Vedic sanskar hai jo is yug mein badal gaya hai.

user: Mahanirvana Tantra ke anusar ek insaan formally ashram mein kab enter karta hai?
assistant: Insaan paida hote hi householder hota hai, lekin jab uske sanskar poore hote hain, tab woh formally kisi ashram mein enter karta hai. Kali Yuga mein sabse pehle Gārhasthya ashram hi adopt karna chahiye.

user: Insaan ki poori life journey ke stages ko is text mein kaise define kiya gaya hai?
assistant: Text kehta hai ki bachpan mein education leni chahiye, jawani mein shaadi karke dhan kamana chahiye, middle age mein religious duties (dharma) karni chahiye, aur budhape mein sanyas lena chahiye.

user: Sanyas ya Avadhuta ashram lene se pehle kounsi conditions poori karni zaroori hain?
assistant: Insaan ko apne budhe parents, devoted wife aur chhote bachon ko chhodkar kabhi sanyas nahi lena chahiye. Family duties pehle aati hain.

user: Ek householder ke basic ethical rules kya hain?
assistant: Householders ko kabhi jhoot nahi bolna chahiye, dhokhadhadi se bachna chahiye aur hamesha deities aur guests ka samman karna chahiye.

user: Agar koi householder mother aur father ko satisfy rakhta hai, toh kya use alag se tapasya karne ki zaroorat hai?
assistant: Nahi, Mahanirvana Tantra kehta hai ki Adya (Mother) aur Brahman (Father) hi jagat ke mata-pita hain. Jo householder apne parents ko khush rakhta hai, use kisi aur kathin tapasya ki zaroorat nahi hoti.

user: Ek bete ka apne parents ke prati kya bartav hona chahiye?
assistant: Ek virtuous bete ko hamesha apne parents se meethi baani bolni chahiye, wahi kaam karna chahiye jo unhe pasand ho aur hamesha unki agya (command) ka palan karna chahiye.

user: Parents ke saamne kis tarah ka behavior prohibit kiya gaya hai?
assistant: Apne bhale ke liye insaan ko parents ke saamne arrogance (akadh), mazak, dhamki ya harsh words use nahi karne chahiye. Unke saamne kisi servant ko bhi nahi daantna chahiye.

user: Parents ki physical needs ka khayal kaise rakha jaye?
assistant: Sahi waqt dekh kar parents ko seat, bed, kapde, khana aur pani offer karna chahiye. Unki physical comfort ka dhyan rakhna householder ki duty hai.

user: Jab parents saamne aayein toh protocol kya hona chahiye?
assistant: Parents ko dekhte hi sadhaka ko samman mein khada ho jana chahiye aur bina unki permission ke wapas nahi baithna chahiye.

user: Family ke saath khana khane ka kya niyam bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Householder ko chahiye ki wo tab tak khana na khaye jab tak usne parents, bachon, bhaiyo aur guests ko khana na khila diya ho, chahe kitni bhi emergency kyun na ho.

user: Ek householder ka 'Sanatana Dharma' kya hai?
assistant: Apni wife ki raksha karna, bachon ko education dena aur apne relatives ka bharan-poshan karna hi householder ka asli Sanatana Dharma hai.

user: Brahmaniṣṭha aur Satyapratijña ka kya matlab hai?
assistant: Brahmaniṣṭha ka matlab hai wo jo Supreme Reality (Brahman) mein hamesha leen rahe, aur Satyapratijña wo hai jo hamesha apne waade aur sachai par tika rahe.

user: Wife ke saath kaisa bhashan aur vyavhar hona chahiye?
assistant: Wife ko kabhi marna nahi chahiye balki use maa ki tarah nurture karna chahiye. Agar wo devoted hai, toh kitni bhi mushkil aaye, use kabhi chhodna nahi chahiye.

user: Doosron ki wives ke saath interaction ke kya rules hain?
assistant: Wise person ko kabhi kisi doosri ki wife ke saath akele (secluded place) mein nahi rehna chahiye, na hi galat bhasha use karni chahiye aur na hi unke saamne faltu ki bravado dikhani chahiye.

user: Marriage mein khushi banaye rakhne ke liye husband ko kya karna chahiye?
assistant: Husband ko hamesha wealth, kapde, pyaar, respect aur gentle words se apni wife ko satisfy rakhna chahiye aur aisa kuch nahi karna chahiye jo use bura lage.

user: Householder ki social responsibilities kya hain?
assistant: Apni family ke alawa householder ko apne village ke logon, guests aur ascetics (sanyasis) ki bhi madad aur support karna chahiye.

user: Personal habits mein moderation kyun zaroori hai?
assistant: Excessive neend, alas (laziness), bahut zyada body care, hairstyle ya khane-peene aur kapdon se zyada attachment nahi rakhni chahiye. In sab mein moderation zaroori hai.

user: Ideal householder ki lifestyle kaisi honi chahiye?
assistant: Use moderate khana, moderate neend aur limited speech aur sexual life rakhni chahiye. Saaf-suthra, humble aur apne har kaam mein skillful hona chahiye.

user: Dushman aur Guru ke prati kaisa attitude hona chahiye?
assistant: Dushman ke saamne bravery (shurta) dikhani chahiye, lekin relatives aur Guru ke saamne hamesha humble aur vinay-sheel rehna chahiye.

user: Kisi par bharosa (trust) karne ka criteria kya hona chahiye?
assistant: Bina soche samjhe trust nahi karna chahiye. Pehle insaan ke saath reh kar uske behaviour, nature aur tendencies ko logic se samajhna chahiye, tabhi trust karna chahiye.

user: Dushman agar chhota ho toh kya strategy honi chahiye?
assistant: Chhote se chhote dushman se bhi wary (saturk) rehna chahiye. Sahi mauka aane par apni power dikhani chahiye, lekin kabhi bhi Dharma ka raasta nahi chhodna chahiye.

user: Apne achhe kaamon aur fame ke baare mein kya niyam hai?
assistant: Dharma janne wale insaan ko apni tareef, apne valor (paurush), doosron ke secrets aur apne kiye huye charitable works ka dhindora nahi peetna chahiye.

user: Defeat ya har ke waqt ek honorable insaan ko kaise act karna chahiye?
assistant: Honorable insaan ko har (defeat) ke darr se kabhi galat kaam nahi karna chahiye. Use kabhi bhi kisi ke saath, chahe wo chhota ho ya bada, faltu jhagda nahi karna chahiye.

user: Verse 168 ke mutabik, dhyan karte waqt Guru, Devta aur Vidya ki sthiti sharir mein kahan honi chahiye?
assistant: Verse 168 ke anusaar, Guru ka dhyan sir (head) mein, Devta ka dhyan hriday-kamal (heart-lotus) mein, aur Vidya ya Mantra ka dhyan zubaan (tongue) par karna chahiye.

user: Guru, Devta aur Mantra ke dhyan ke baad Atma ka chintan kis tarah karne ko kaha gaya hai?
