user: Kali Yuga mein manushya ki mansikta kaisi ho jati hai?
assistant: Kali Yuga ke prabhav se manushya kaam-kinkar (vasnaon ka gulaam) ban jata hai aur uski buddhi dharam se hatkar bhatakne lagti hai.

user: Pradosh ke samay stotra path karne ka kya mahatva bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Pradosh ke samay har roz stotra ka paath karna chahiye. Khaas taur par ek jnani purush ko chahiye ki woh Somvaar ke din apne doston aur sage-sambandhiyon ko yeh sunaye aur iska arth achhe se samjhaye.

user: Ek Brahmanishth purush ke andar kaun se gun hone chahiye?
assistant: Ek Brahmanishth vyakti ko jalan (matsarya) aur dhong se door rehna chahiye. Use dayalu, saaf mann wala aur apne mata-pita ki seva mein hamesha laga rehne wala hona chahiye.

user: Brahmamantri ya kisi adhyatmik vyakti ko kin kaamon se bachna chahiye?
assistant: Unhe jhoot bolne aur doosron ka bura chahne se bachna chahiye. Iske saath hi, par-stri gaman (adultery) se bilkul door rehna chahiye.

user: Kya kisi bhi kaam ko shuru karte waqt koi khaas mantra bolna chahiye?
assistant: Haan, kisi bhi karya ke prarambh mein 'Tat Sat' bolna chahiye. Aur jab aap kuch khate ya peete hain, toh 'Brahmārpaṇam' bolkar use ishwar ko arpan kar dena chahiye.

user: Mahamantra ki sadhna mein sabse zaroori cheez kya hoti hai?
assistant: Is mahamantra ki sadhna ke liye koi kathin sharirik niyam nahi, balki manasik sankalpa aur bhav-shuddhi (purity of intention) ki sabse zyada zaroori hoti hai.

user: Kaliyug mein moksha paane ke liye Brahmasadhan ko hi kyun chuna gaya hai?
assistant: Kaliyug mein kathin tapasya ka asar khatam ho gaya hai aur har taraf paap badh gaya hai. Aise samay mein sirf Brahmasadhan hi ekmatra rasta hai jo jeev ka uddhar kar sakta hai.

user: Kaliyug ke logon ki mansikta aur jeevan ke baare mein shastron mein kya kaha gaya hai?
assistant: Kaliyug mein logon ki umar kam hogi aur unka jeevan sirf khane-peene par nirbhar rahega. Woh lobhi honge aur dhan kamane ke chakkar mein unka mann hamesha chanchal rahega, jis wajah se woh kathin anushthan nahi kar payenge.

user: Agar koi yoga ya samadhi nahi kar pa raha, toh uske liye kya rasta hai?
assistant: Jo log yoga ki mushkilon ko nahi jhel sakte ya samadhi mein sthir nahi reh sakte, unke bhale aur moksha ke liye Brahmopasana ka rasta banaya gaya hai, jo bahut hi saaf aur saral hai.

user: Tantra ke anusar din bhar ki puja-path ka kya niyam hai?
assistant: Tantra ke mutabik subah ke zaruri kaam khatam karke trikālīn sandhyā karni chahiye aur dopehar mein pūjā. Lekin Parabrahma ki upasana mein sadhak ki apni ichha hi sabse bada niyam maani jati hai.

user: Brahmasadhan mein niyam aur nishedh (prohibitions) ka kya role hai?
assistant: Brahmasadhan ek aisa rasta hai jahan saare niyam ek sevak ki tarah hote hain aur koi bhi rok-tok insan par haavi nahi hoti. Isme insaan apni marzi se siddhi prapt kar sakta hai, isliye yeh sabse bada sahara hai.

user: Parāṅmukhī Mudra ko perform karne ka sahi tarika kya hai aur iska maqsad kya hota hai?
assistant: Parāṅmukhī Mudra mein thumbs se kaan, index fingers se aankhein, middle fingers se nostrils aur baaki ungliyon se muh ko band kiya jata hai. Iska maqsad senses ko rok kar Suṣumnā nadi ke andar saaf aur pure Nāda (internal sound) ko sunna hai.

user: Yoga ki Ārambha Avasthā mein sharir aur mann mein kya badlav aate hain?
assistant: Jab Anāhata Chakra ki Brahma Granthi pierce hoti hai, tab ornaments jaisi awaaz sunayi deti hai. Isse yogi ka sharir divine (divya), tejasvi aur bimaariyon se mukt ho jata hai, aur uska dil khushi se bhar jata hai.

user: Ghaṭa Avasthā kya hai aur isme kis tarah ke sounds sunayi dete hain?
assistant: Yeh yoga ki dusri stage hai jahan Prāṇa aur Apāna ka milan hota hai aur Vishnu Granthi pierce hoti hai. Is stage mein yogi ko Bherī yaani bade nagade jaisa sound sunayi deta hai aur uski buddhi pehle se zyada sharp ho jati hai.

user: Paricaya Avasthā mein yogi ko kaunsi shaktiyan milti hain aur dhyan kahan hota hai?
assistant: Is teesri stage mein dhyan eyebrows ke beech 'Mahāśūnya' par hota hai. Yahan Mardala drum jaisa sound sunayi deta hai aur yogi ko Aṇimā jaisi Siddhis (supernatural powers) haasil hone lagti hain.

user: Niṣpatti Avasthā ko yoga ki akhiri stage kyun maana jata hai?
assistant: Kyunki is stage mein Prāṇa Rudra Granthi ko cross karke Brahmarandhra tak pahunch jata hai. Yahan Veṇu (flute) aur Vīṇā jaise madhur sounds sunayi dete hain, jo ki supreme bliss aur perfection ki nishani hai.

user: Kya sirf physical Haṭha Yoga karne se ultimate goal mil sakta hai?
assistant: Text ke mutabik, jo yogi Rāja Yoga ko nahi jaante aur sirf physical Haṭha Yoga karte hain, unhe apni mehnat ka pura phal nahi milta. Sachhi shanti aur liberation ke liye Nādānusandhāna yaani sound par dhyan lagana zaroori hai.

user: Unmanī Avasthā ya Turya state ko jaldi paane ka sabse asan tarika kya hai?
assistant: Eyebrows ke beech (Bhrūmadhya) dhyan lagana sabse simple aur fast method hai. Isse mind ki saari chintaon ka nasha ho jata hai aur insaan jaldi hi Turya yaani fourth state of consciousness mein pahunch jata hai.

user: Nāda Yoga ke shuruat, beech aur anth mein sunayi dene wale sounds mein kya farq hai?
assistant: Shuruat mein ocean aur baadalon jaise bhari sounds sunayi dete hain. Beech ki stage mein bell aur conch (shankh) jaise sounds aate hain. Anth mein sounds bahut barik ho jate hain, jaise choti ghantiyaan, flute ya madhumakkhi ki buzzing.

user: Dhyāna ka asli matlab kya bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Dhyāna ka matlab hai bina kisi bhatkav ke Brahman ya Nāda ki taraf awareness ka ek jaisa flow banaye rakhna. Jab mind puri tarah inner sound mein merge ho jata hai aur baaki sab bhul jata hai, wahi asli dhyan hai.

user: Jab mind Nāda mein dissolve ho jata hai, tab kya hota hai?
assistant: Uss state mein mind ki saari modifications (vṛttis) khatam ho jati hain. Yogi ko pure consciousness ka anubhav hota hai jo har tarah ke limitations se azad hoti hai. Yeh state hi Ātman ka supreme abode hai.

user: Brahmākāravṛtti ka basic concept kya hai aur spiritual path mein iska kya role hota hai?
assistant: Brahmākāravṛtti ka matlab hai jab mind 'Brahman' ka form le leta hai. Jaise lake mein ripples banti hain, waise hi 'Aham Brahmāsmi' (Main Brahman hoon) ek final thought-wave hai jo ignorance ko khatam karti hai. Iska kaam us kante ki tarah hota hai jo pair mein fase dusre kante ko nikalne ke kaam aata hai.

user: Brahmākāravṛtti ko end mein kyun tyagna padta hai?
assistant: Kyunki liberation sirf 'thinking' nahi balki 'being' hai. Jab 'I am Brahman' wali vṛtti ignorance ko mita deti hai, toh us vṛtti ko bhi dissolve hona padta hai taaki mind bilkul silent ho sake aur sirf pure consciousness bache. Isse hi supreme dispassion ya paramavairāgya kehte hain.

user: Sage Vasistha ke according peace kaise attain ki ja sakti hai?
assistant: Vasistha ji kehte hain ki ye world 'sankalpa' ya mind ki imagination hai. Peace tab milti hai jab insaan external aur internal worries ko chhod kar 'Nirvikalpa' (concept-free reality) mein refuge leta hai. Iska matlab hai Self par focus karna jo space, time aur doer/enjoyer jaise bhedon se pare hai.

user: Advaita Vedanta ka 'world as imagination' view Buddhist philosophy se kaise alag hai?
assistant: Difference ye hai ki Advaita mein Brahman ko ek 'real substratum' (base) mana jata hai jis par illusion dikhta hai. Jabki kuch Buddhist schools mein base ko bhi mental hi mana jata hai. Advaita kehta hai ki jab mind dissolve hota hai toh duality khatam ho jati hai, lekin reality (Brahman) hamesha rehti hai.

user: Mind ka Self mein dissolve hona kin examples se samjhaya gaya hai?
assistant: Isse camphor (kapoor) aur salt (namak) ke examples se samjhaya gaya hai. Jaise kapoor aag ke contact mein aakar aag ban jata hai, aur namak paani mein milkar paani ka roop le leta hai, waise hi mind jab Self se unite hota hai toh wo apni alag identity kho deta hai.

user: Samādhi aur Cittavṛttinirodha ka kya connection hai?
assistant: Samādhi ka matlab hi mental modifications ka ruk jana (cittavṛttinirodha) hai. Ye wo state hai jahan insaan ko bina kisi doubt ya error ke Self ka direct experience hota hai. Matsyendra jaise masters ne isi path ko attain karne ka tarika bataya hai.

user: Manonmanī state aur subtle energy channels ka kya significance hai?
assistant: Manonmanī wo thought-free state hai jise 'Turīya' (fourth state) kaha jata hai. Ye Suṣumnā channel ke through achieve hoti hai. Ye wo consciousness ki power hai jo body aur mind jaise inert cheezon ko life aur awareness deti hai.

user: Nādānusandhāna meditation ki practice kaise ki jati hai?
assistant: Isme yogi Siddhāsana mein baith kar Shambhavi Mudra lagata hai aur right ear se inner sound (nāda) sunne ki koshish karta hai. Ye sound Suṣumnā channel ke andar produce hota hai aur concentration badhane ka sabse asar-daar tarika hai.

user: Nādopāsana ke dauran sounds ka progression kis tarah hota hai?
assistant: Shuruat mein ye sound madhumakkhiyo (bees) ki humming jaisa hota hai, fir flute aur bell jaisa sunayi deta hai. Jaise-jaise practice deep hoti hai, ye sound ocean ki tarah steady aur end mein thundering clouds (badal ki garaj) jaisa profound ho jata hai.

user: Kya kisi pret ko uske parivaar walo dwara kiye gaye dharm-karam ka phal mil sakta hai?
assistant: Haan, mil sakta hai, lekin iski ek shart hai. Agar us pret ki buddhi 'shubh' (auspicious) hai, tabhi use apne bandoon dwara samarpit dharm ka phal prapt hota hai.

user: Agar kisi pret mein vasana (desire) bahut prabal ho, toh kya use dharm-phal milna band ho jata hai?
assistant: Nahi, agar vasana ki prabalya ke peeche koi 'arthasayatva' (worldly purpose ya attachment) ka hetu hai, toh us sthiti mein bhi soul ko dharm-phal ki prapti ho sakti hai.

user: Yogishastra ke anusar yogiyon ki mrityu ke kaun se do mukhya prakar bataye gaye hain?
assistant: Pehla prakar hai 'Prarabdha-bhog' ke liye apni iccha se naye shariron ki kalpana karna, aur doosra hai saare prarabdha karma khatam hone par 'Videha-kaivalya' yaani bodiless liberation prapt karna.

user: Yogi prarabdha karma ko khatam karne ke liye naye sharir kaise dharan karte hain?
assistant: Yogis apni iccha ke anusar vividh shariron ki kalpana karte hain. Jaise sapne mein ek roop chodkar doosra le liya jata hai, vaise hi Yogi bina purane sharir ke nishaan (residue) chhode naye sharir mein pravesh kar lete hain.

user: Shri Vasistha ne yogi ke deha-parivartan ko samjhane ke liye kaun sa udaharan diya hai?
assistant: Unhone samjhaya ki jaise 'ativahika deha' (subtle body) mein ek mrig (deer) ka bhav tyag kar manushya ka bhav kalpit kiya jata hai, vaise hi yogi bina kisi purv-shesh (residue) ke naya sharir dharan karta hai.

user: Videha-kaivalya ke samay yogi ka sharir kaise vilupt hota hai?
assistant: Is sthiti mein yogi ka sharir dhoop mein 'himkan' (snowflake) ki tarah ya sharat-kaal ke saaf aasman mein safed badal ki tarah gayab ho jata hai. Wo dikhte hue bhi adrishya ho jata hai.

user: Kya yogi ki antim mukti ke baad uske sharir ka koi 'parishesha' ya residue bachta hai?
assistant: Nahi, antim mukti mein purane sharir ka koi ansh nahi bachta. Agar thodi der ke liye kuch dikhayi bhi deta hai, toh wo sirf ek 'bhram' (illusion) hota hai jo bahut kam samay ke liye rehta hai.

user: Mantra ke alag-alag variations create karne ka kya process bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Mantra ke har ek part (pad) mein, ya saare parts mein ek saath, 'Pranava' (Om) ko add karke ya hatakar kai tarah ke mantras banaye ja sakte hain.

user: Kya 'Pranava' ko sirf single parts ke saath hi use kiya ja sakta hai?
assistant: Nahi, 'Pranava' ko mantra ke do-do pads (parts) ke pairs banakar bhi unke saath include ya exclude kiya ja sakta hai, jisse naye mantras generate hote hain.

user: Is mantra construction ke rule ka reference number kya hai?
assistant: Yeh poori vidhi aur mantra creation ka process text ke verse number 38 mein explain kiya gaya hai.

user: Mantra mein 'Pranava' ka inclusion ya exclusion kyun zaroori hai?
assistant: Pranava ke inclusion ya exclusion se ek hi basic mantra se kayi prakar ke alag-alag mantras उत्पन्न (produce) hote hain, jo alag purposes ke liye use kiye ja sakte hain.

user: Yoga Vasistha ke anusar ye vishal parvat aur jagat vastav mein kya hain?
assistant: Ye parvat aur jagat sthool roop mein dikhne ke bawajood asliyat mein nirakar gyan roop hain. Jaise hum sapne mein ek vishal nagar ko apne dimaag ke ek chote se kone mein dekh lete hain, waise hi ye saara drishya hamari chetna ke andar samaya hua hai.

user: Kya ek chote se chaitanya anu mein anant brahmand sama sakte hain?
assistant: Haan, jaise kele ke patton ki parat ek choti si jagah mein simti hoti hai, waise hi atyant sookshm chaitanya mein anant jagat reh sakte hain. Har chid-anu ke andar ek jagat hai aur uske andar bhi aur chid-anu hain.

user: Jab sab kuch bhram hai, toh Raja Padma ne Leela ko satya roop mein kaise dekha?
assistant: Jab hamara chitta (mind) kisi dridh vasna ya abhyas mein fasa hota hai, toh wahi vyavaharik padarth humein sach lagne lagta hai. Raja Padma ke mann mein jo vasna thi, usne us bhranti ko hi sach bana diya.

user: Atma shareer kaise chhodti hai aur dusra roop kaise dharan karti hai?
assistant: Atma pran-vayu ka roop dharan karke nadi-marg se shareer chhodti hai. Phir apni purani vasnaon aur sankalpon ke hisaab se, wo doosre shareer ya yoni mein pravesh karti hai, jaise sapne mein hum ek naya roop dekh lete hain.

user: Devi Saraswati ne khud ko 'Samashti Chetna' kyun kaha hai?
assistant: Devi ne bataya ki wo Hiranyagarbha ya collective consciousness hain. Wo har jeev ki vyashti chetna ka mool hain aur sabki kuldevi hone ke naate wo sab kuch swatah hi sanchalit karti hain.

user: Chid-akasha kitna vishal hai aur isme brahmand kaise dikhte hain?
assistant: Chid-akasha itna vishal hai ki Garud bhi karodon kalpon tak udkar iska ant nahi paa sakta. Isme lakho-karodon brahmand aise hain jaise kisi vishal van mein anant phal hote hain, jo ek doosre ko kabhi dekh nahi paate.

user: Samsar mein niyam aur aniyam (laws and irregularities) ek saath kaise rehte hain?
assistant: Samsar satya aur asatya ka mishran (Maya) hai. Agar ye sirf satya hota toh sirf niyam hote, agar sirf asatya hota toh sirf aniyam. Hamare karma aur vasnaon ke hisaab se chaitanya ka vishv-vivart niyamit dikhta hai.

user: Kya Brahma ya Ishwar hamari kismat hamari vasnaon ke bina likhte hain?
assistant: Nahi, ye srishti ka abhyas hamari vasna aur karma ke sapeksh (relative) hi banaya gaya hai. Ishwar hamari ichhaon aur karmon ke anusar hi sansar ka anubhav prakat karte hain.

user: Ativahik lok kya hai aur wahan kaun ja sakta hai?
assistant: Ativahik lok sookshm chetna ke lok hain. Wahan sirf wo ja sakte hain jo tattvagyani hain ya jinhone yog-abhyas se param dharm ka ashray liya hai. Bina gyan aur punya ke wahan sthiti nahi mil sakti.

user: Atma jab shareer chhodti hai toh punarjanm ka process kya hota hai?
assistant: Atma sookshm roop mein pita ke khaye huye ann dwara veerya banti hai, phir mata ke udar mein garbh banti hai. Purv-karmon ke anusar wahi jeev dukh ya sukh, rog ya arogya ke saath naya shareer dharan karta hai.

user: Maran-avastha mein teen tarah ke purush kaun se hote hain?
assistant: Teen tarah ke log hote hain: Murkh (jo bina gyan ke dukh paate hain), Dharananishth (jo pran aur mann ko rokne ka abhyas karte hain), aur Yuktiman (jo yog se apni iccha anusar shareer chhodne mein nipunn hote hain).

user: Preton ke kitne prakar bataye gaye hain aur unki gati kya hoti hai?
assistant: Preton ke cheh (6) bhed hain: sadharan, madhyam aur bhari papi, aur waise hi teen tarah ke dharmatma. Bhari papi ek saal tak patthar ki tarah muron rehte hain, phir narak aur jad yoni (ped-paudhe) mein dukh bhogte hain.

user: Kya papiyon ka dukh kabhi khatam hota hai?
assistant: Haan, ek dukh ke baad doosra dukh bhogte huye, saikdon yoniyon ke baad jab unke paap-phal ka ant hota hai, tab unhe is sansar-roopi swapna mein shanti milti hai.

user: Mahan punyatmaon ki mrityu ke baad kya gati hoti hai?
assistant: Mahapunyatma swarg aur vidyadhar lok ka sukh bhogte hain. Phir apne thode-bahut bache huye paapon ka phal bhogkar, wo dhani aur sajjan gharon mein punarjanm lete hain.

user: Jad (inanimate) aur Chetan (animate) mein mool antar kya hai?
assistant: Mool roop mein dono ek hi chaitanya hain. Antar sirf itna hai ki jinmein chidra (channels) hote hain wahan vayu pravesh karke chesta (movement) paida karti hai, jise hum 'jeevit' kehte hain. Ped-paudhon mein chidra na hone ki wajah se wo nischest (motionless) rehte hain.

user: Raja Vidurath ko Yampuri mein kya faisla sunaya gaya?
assistant: Yamraj ne unke karmon ka hisaab karke bataya ki unhone koi paap nahi kiya hai aur wo Saraswati ji ke var-daan se punya-shali hain. Unhe aagya mili ki wo wapas jaakar apne purane mrit shareer (Raja Padma) mein pravesh karein.

user: Kya atma ko rasta dikhane ke liye hamesha guide ki zaroorat hoti hai?
assistant: Nahi, jab prarabdh karma khatam ho jaata hai, toh purv janm ki adhuri vasnaen khud hi rasta dikha deti hain. Jeev apni purani smriti aur ichha ke bal par bina kisi guide ke apne lakshya tak pahunch jata hai.

user: Karpoor Gauram mantra mein Shiv ji ke roop ka varnan kaise kiya gaya hai?
assistant: Is mantra mein Shiv ji ko karpoor (camphor) ke saman gora aur chamakdar bataya gaya hai. Unhe karuna ka avtaar aur is pure sansar ka saar mana gaya hai.

user: Shiv Yajur Mantra ke mutabik Bhagwan Shiv apne gale mein kya dharan karte hain?
assistant: Mantra ke anusar, Shiv ji ne naagon ke raja (Vasuki) ko apne gale mein haar ke roop mein dharan kiya hua hai, jise 'Bhujagendra Haaram' kaha gaya hai.

user: Bhakt apne hridaya mein Shiv ji ko kiske saath nivas karne ki prarthna karta hai?
assistant: Bhakt prarthna karta hai ki Bhagwan Shiv hamesha unke hridaya roopi kamal mein Mata Bhawani (Parvati) ke saath nivas karein.

user: Mahamrityunjaya Mantra mein 'Tryambakam' shabd ka kya arth hai?
assistant: Tryambakam ka arth hai 'teen netron wale' (three-eyed). Yeh mantra teen aankhon wale Bhagwan Shiv ko samarpit hai jo pure sansar ka palan-poshan karte hain.

user: Mahamrityunjaya Mantra mein kheeray (Urvarukam) ka udaharan kyun diya gaya hai?
assistant: Jaise ek pakka hua kheera bina kisi dard ya kashth ke apni bel (vine) se alag ho jata hai, waise hi bhakt prarthna karte hain ki unhe bhi mrityu ke bandhan se sahajta se mukti mile.

user: Mantra mein 'Sugandhim Pushtivardhanam' ka kya matlab nikalta hai?
assistant: Iska matlab hai ki Bhagwan Shiv jeevan mein shubhkamnayein aur sugandh failate hain aur hamari shakti aur unnati (nourishment) ko badhate hain.

user: Mahamrityunjaya Mantra se hum kis tarah ki mukti ki kamna karte hain?
assistant: Hum prarthna karte hain ki humein mrityu ke dar aur sansarik bandhanon se mukti mile, lekin hum 'amritat' yani moksh aur amar tatva se kabhi door na hon.

user: Yoga Vasistha ke mutabiq 'Main Jagat hoon' wali soch ko kya mana gaya hai?
assistant: Is soch ko ek 'bhranti' ya illusion mana gaya hai. Iska matlab hai ki jab insaan khud ko is material world se identify karta hai, toh woh ek galat fehmi mein hota hai.

user: Spiritual context mein 'Atyantabhavrup Anutpatti' ka kya arth nikalta hai?
assistant: Iska matlab hai 'absolute non-existence'. Iska arth yeh hai ki yeh sansar kabhi paida hi nahi hua; yeh sirf ek illusion hai jo kabhi real tha hi nahi.

user: Vasistha ji ne drishya ya perception ko 'pishach' kyu kaha hai?
assistant: Kyunki jab tak hum is duniya ko sach maante hain, yeh ek pishach (demon) ki tarah humein dukh aur bandhan mein fansaye rakhti hai. Jab sach ka gyan hota hai, tabhi yeh pishach puri tarah khatam hota hai.

user: Samadhi ki awastha mein 'tri-kalika drishya' ke saath kya hota hai?
assistant: Samadhi mein 'tri-kalika drishya' yaani past, present aur future ka jo worldly perception hai, woh poori tarah 'badhit' ya negate ho jata hai. Insaan waqt ke ehsas se pare nikal jata hai.

user: Kya sansar ka ye 'badh' ya negation sirf Samadhi tak hi limited hota hai?
assistant: Nahi, Rishi Vasistha ke anusaar, jinhe sach ka gyan ho jata hai, unke liye yeh negation har waqt aur har haal mein bana rehta hai, sirf meditation ke waqt hi nahi.

user: Yoga Vasistha ke is samvaad mein guru aur shishya kaun hain?
assistant: Is samvaad mein Rishi Vasistha guru hain aur woh Shri Ramachandra ji ko ye gehri spiritual baatein samjha rahe hain.

user: Jab gyan hota hai toh 'drishya' ka kya anubhav hota hai?
assistant: Gyan hone par insaan ko yeh mehsoos hota hai ki jo kuch bhi usey dikh raha hai (drishya), uska koi independent existence nahi hai aur woh hamesha se absent tha.

user: Parthiv sharir aur shuddh chetna yaani 'Apárthiva Samvit' ke beech kya antar hai?
assistant: Parthiv sharir prithvi ke vikar se bana hota hai, jabki Apárthiva Samvit shuddh chetan swaroop hai. In dono ka milan ya abhed hona impossible hai, thik waise hi jaise ek kalpnik pahad aur ek asli pahad kabhi aapas mein takra nahi sakte.

user: Agar sharir mansik hai, toh hume ye physical yaani parthiv kyun mehsus hota hai?
assistant: Ye humare 'Ativahika' yaani sukshma sharir hone ki wajah se hai. Jaise sapne, gehre dhyan, ya bhram mein man ki cheezein asli lagti hain, waise hi purane abhyas aur dridh dharna ke karan log apne sukshma sharir ko hi physical samajh baithte hain.

user: Sharir ke is parthiv hone ke bhram se chhutkara kab milta hai?
assistant: Jab samadhi ke nirantar abhyas se insaan ki vasnayein aur sanskar ksheen (kam) ho jate hain, tab sharir ka parthiv hone ka bhram mit jata hai aur woh apne asli 'Ativahika' yaani sukshma swaroop mein wapas aa jata hai.

user: Kya gyan hone par kalpnik ya mithya padarthon ka upbhog band ho jata hai?
assistant: Haan, jab tak agyan rehta hai tabhi tak insaan kalpnik cheezon ko sach maan kar unka bhog karta hai. Jaise hi yatharth gyan hota hai, in sabhi mithya padarthon ki nivritti ho jati hai aur unka bhram toot jata hai.

user: Advait Vedant ke anusar Guru, Shishya aur Shastra ke bhed ki kya ahmiyat hai?
assistant: Ye bhed sirf gyan prapti se pehle updesh dene ke liye swikar kiye jate hain. Ek baar jab atma-gyan ho jata hai aur param-tatva ka sakshatkar ho jata hai, tab ye saara dvait khatam ho jata hai aur sirf ek adwait brahm hi shesh rehta hai.

user: Ek atma-gyani apne sharir ke panch-koshon ko kis nazariye se dekhta hai?
assistant: Gyani purush apne sharir aur Annamaya se lekar Anandmaya tak ke panch-koshon ko alag nahi dekhta. Uske liye ye sab Param Brahma ki mahima se paripoorn hain aur swayam Brahma ka hi ek roop hain.

user: Adrishya chetna ya 'Chiti' is drishya jagat ke roop mein kaise dikhne lagti hai?
assistant: Panchikarana ki prakriya aur sthul kalpna ke karan, wahi ek anant tatva khud ko drishya padarthon ke saath jod leta hai. Is taadatmya (identification) ki wajah se woh bhramvash khud ko bhi drishya aur simit samajhne lagta hai.

user: Shri Yog Vasistha ke anusar, yeh bhautik deh Tattvagyan ki prapti mein kis tarah ki badha utpann karti hai?
assistant: Shastra ke anusar, yeh deh na keval anya shrishtiyon ke darwaze par rok lagati hai, balki yeh Tattvagyan (self-realization) mein bhi pratibandhak hai. Jab tak abhyas ki kami rehti hai, tab tak vyakti ka antahkaran 'Chidabhasa' (reflected consciousness) mein hi uljha rehta hai aur woh apne asli Brahm-swaroop ko nahi dekh paata.

user: Shlok 43 mein sankalp se bane nagar aur is sharir ke sambandh mein kya tark diya gaya hai?
assistant: Isme 'Kaemutika Nyaya' ka prayog karke samjhaya gaya hai ki jab koi vyakti apne swayam ke sankalp ya manorath se banaye gaye nagar ko is bhautik sharir se prapt nahi kar sakta, toh yeh bilkul asambhav hai ki woh kisi doosre ke sankalp se rachi gayi srishti ko kisi anya deh se prapt kar sake.

user: Sankalp-lok ka anubhav karne ke liye 'Chidvyomarupini' banne ka kya arth hai?
assistant: Chidvyomarupini hone ka arth hai is sthool deh ke abhiman aur pehchan ko tyag kar 'Shuddh Chaitanya Aakash' ke swaroop mein sthit ho jana. Jab koi apni chetna ko is simit sharir se hatakar anant chaitanya mein le jata hai, tabhi woh sankalpit satya ya par-laukik drishyon ko turant dekhne mein samarth hota hai.

user: Sankalp se nirmit nagar ki vyavaharik satyata (reality) ki kya seemayein hain?
assistant: Sankalp se bana nagar keval uske apne upbhog aur vyavahar ke liye hi 'satya' ya functional hota hai. Iska matlab hai ki us nagar ke anubhav sirf usi mansik star tak seemit hain. Woh bhautik deh se kiye jane wale anya kaaryon ya sansarik vyavaharon ke liye satya nahi mana jata.

user: Yog Vasistha ke in shlokon ka mool updesh kya hai?
assistant: Mool updesh yeh hai ki drishya jagat aur sankalpit jagat ki apni-apni simayein hain. Agar koi param satya ya sookshm anubhavon ko prapt karna chahta hai, toh use is nartaki (deh) se moh bhang karke shuddh chaitanya swaroop ko apnana hoga, kyunki sharir sankalp-lok ki yatra mein sabse badi rukawat hai.

user: Leela ne Devi ko dhanyavad kyun diya aur unki kya vishesh ikchha thi?
assistant: Leela ne Devi ko isliye dhanyavad diya kyunki unhone use ek 'shreshtha drishti' di thi jo subah ki roshni ki tarah sach dikhati hai. Unki ikchha thi ki woh us parvatiya gaon ki srishti ko dekh sakein jahan ek brahmin apni patni ke saath rehta tha.

user: Devi ke anusar dusri srishti ko dekhne ke liye Leela ko kis tarah ki drishti apnani hogi?
assistant: Devi ne kaha ki unhe 'chetyashunya chinmaya drishti' (shuddh chetna) ka sahara lena hoga. Iske liye unhe samadhi ke madhyam se apne vartaman sharir aur uske moh ko bhulna hoga, tabhi woh chidakash mein us srishti ko prapt kar sakengi.

user: Hum apne is bhautik sharir se dusri srishti ko kyun nahi dekh paate?
assistant: Iska karan yeh hai ki yeh jagat maya se bana hai aur amurta (bina kisi thos akar ke) hai. Lekin mithya-gyan ya bhram ke karan log ise thos samajh lete hain, isliye is sharir ki seemayein dusri srishtiyon ko dekhne mein rukavat banti hain.

user: Devi ne sone aur angoothi ke udaharan se Brahman aur jagat ke rishte ko kaise samjhaya?
assistant: Devi ne samjhaya ki jaise log sone ko angoothi samajh lete hain, jabki 'angoothipana' sone ka asli gun nahi balki ek roop hai, waise hi Brahman ne jagat ka roop dhar kiya hai par asal mein wahan jagat nahi, sirf Brahman hi hai.

user: Samudra mein dhool ke pratibimb ka udharan yahan kya darshata hai?
assistant: Yeh udharan batata hai ki jaise saaf samudra mein dhool nahi hoti par bhram se uski parchhayi dikh sakti hai, waise hi shuddh Brahman mein maya ke karan jagat ka bhram dikhayi deta hai, jabki vastav mein wahan sirf shunya ya akash hi hai.

user: Is baat ka kya praman hai ki jagat jhootha hai aur Brahman hi ekmatra satya hai?
assistant: Iske liye teen mukhya praman bataye gaye hain: pehla Upanishad ke vakya (shastra), doosra Guru ka updesh aur teesra vyakti ka apna niji anubhav.

user: Brahman ko dekhne ke liye 'bhed-buddhi' ko khatam karna kyun zaroori hai?
assistant: Jab tak insan khud ko sharir se jodkar dekhta hai (bhed-buddhi), tab tak woh khud ko Brahman se alag samajhta hai. Jab tak yeh bhed bana rahega, woh Brahman ko nahi dekh sakta. Is bhed ko mitane ke liye baar-baar dhyan aur abhyas ki zaroorat hoti hai.

user: Devi ne apne sharir ki prakriti aur Brahman ke sakshatkar ke bare mein kya bataya?
assistant: Devi ne bataya ki unka sharir kisi thos cheez se nahi balki 'shuddh chittakash' (pure consciousness) se bana hai. Isliye woh apne antar-karan mein hi Brahman ka sakshatkar karti hain.

user: Shlok mein 'Pado'sya vishva bhutani' ka sandarbh kis liye diya gaya hai?
assistant: Iska arth hai ki yeh poora brahmand aur iske saare prani Parmatma ka sirf ek ansh (ek chauthayi hissa) hain, jabki unka asli aur amrit swaroop isse kahin bada aur divya hai. Brahma aur anya devta isi vishuddh chitt wali dehi se sab kuch Brahman mein hi sthit dekhte hain.

user: 'Smaryatenena iti smaranam' ki vyutpatti ke anusar smaran ka kya swaroop hai?
assistant: Is vyutpatti ka arth hai 'jis ke dwara yaad kiya jata hai'. Yeh smaran keval memory nahi balki mann se judi individual aur collective consciousness hai, jise 'vedana' bhi kaha jata hai. Ise Ishwar ki Maya ka ek karya maana gaya hai.

user: Maya aur Antahkarana ke bhed se karya-kaaran ka sambandh kaise banta hai?
assistant: Jab Mayapadi aur Antahkaranapadi ke beech bhed prakat hota hai, tabhi karya (effect) ka astitva paida hota hai. Yeh pura astitva karya-kaaran (dukkha) ke niyam ke adheen hota hai.

user: Vishisht bodh hone par karya-kaaran ki sthiti mein kya badlav aata hai?
assistant: Jab vishisht bodh hota hai, toh woh karya-kaaran ke siddhant ko 'baadhit' (sublate) kar deta hai. Iske baad 'kriya' aur 'kaaran' jaise shabd sirf vyavahar ke liye reh jaate hain, unki koi vastavik satta nahi bachti.

user: Swarajyasiddhi granth mein smaran aur chetna ko lekar kya insight di gayi hai?
assistant: Swarajyasiddhi mein bataya gaya hai ki smaran aur chetna Maya ke karya hain. Jab tak hum bhed dekhte hain, tab tak karya-kaaran ka chakra chalta hai, lekin tatvashah yeh sab vastavik nahi hain.

user: Mitti aur ghade (pot) ke udhaharan se 'hetutva' aur 'karyatva' buddhi ko kaise samjhaya gaya hai?
assistant: Agar koi vyakti mitti aur ghade dono ka dhyan karta hai, toh usme 'cause' (mitti) aur 'effect' (ghada) ki buddhi hoti hai. Lekin agar dhyan sirf mitti par ho, toh na koi karya (effect) dikhta hai aur na hi koi kaaran (cause).

user: Brahman ko vishwa ka 'hetu' kab mana jata hai aur kab nahi?
assistant: Jab drashta Maya aur prapancha (jagat) par dhyan deta hai, tab use Brahman vishwa ka kaaran (hetu) pratit hota hai. Magar jab dhyan sirf 'ekroop sannmatra' (pure existence) par hota hai, tab na Maya dikhti hai aur na hi vishwa.

user: Advaita Vedanta ki drishti mein jagat aur uske niyamo ki vastavikta kya hai?
assistant: Advaita drishti ke anusar, parmarthik star par yeh jagat aur karya-kaaran ke niyam vastavik nahi hain. Jab shuddh advait satta ka anubhav hota hai, toh saare bhed aur kaaran-karya ke sambandh lupt ho jaate hain.

user: Jab purva kalp ke Brahma ki vasanaon se yukt avidya ka nash hota hai, toh uska mool parinaam kya nikalta hai?
assistant: Jab tattvajnana ke zariye avidya ka badh hota hai, toh sabse pehle mool avidya aur uske saath judi sabhi vasanaein khatam ho jati hain. Iske baad poora drishyamana jagat, jo sirf ek pratitee (appearance) tha, uska badh ho jata hai aur sirf shuddha Adhisthana yaani Brahma hi shesh bachta hai.

user: Vedanta ke anusar Moksha ki sthiti ko kaise samjha ja sakta hai?
assistant: Avidya ke hatne aur adhisthana tatva (Brahma) ke gyan hone ki sthiti ko hi Moksha kehte hain. Ismein jeev ko apne nitya, shuddha aur mukt swaroop ka anubhav hota hai, aur woh sansar ke dukhon aur janm-mrityu ke chakra se hamesha ke liye azad ho jata hai.

user: Karya aur Karan ke sambandh mein sahkari karano (auxiliary causes) ka kya mahatva hai?
assistant: Kisi bhi karya (jaise Pat ya kapda) ki utpatti ke liye mool karan (jaise Tantu ya dhaga) ke saath sahkari karano (tana, bana, aur bunkar ka shram) ki zaroorat hoti hai. Inhe 'upkarak' isliye kehte hain kyunki ye karya ko siddha karne mein madad karte hain.

user: Karya-karan bhav mein 'Anavastha Dosha' kab paida hota hai?
assistant: Anavastha dosha tab paida hota hai jab hum har 'upkarak' (helper) ko siddha karne ke liye ek naya sahkari karan maanne lagte hain. Agar har madad ke peeche ek aur madad ki zaroorat hogi, toh yeh silsila kabhi khatam nahi hoga (infinite regress), jisse karya-karan ka tार्किक adhaar hi gir jata hai.

user: Agar karya-karan sambandh tार्किक roop se baadhith ho jaye, toh kya unke beech ka bhed bana rehta hai?
assistant: Nahi, jab karya-karan bhav ka badh ho jata hai, toh unka 'Abheda' (non-difference) khatam nahi hota. Iska karan yeh hai ki vastav mein bhed paida karne wala koi satya tatva hai hi nahi. Bhed sirf ek kalpana hai, jabki adhisthana (jaise dhaga) hi saccha hai.

user: Kya 'Pat' (kapda) aur 'Tantu' (dhaga) mein koi vastavik antar hai?
assistant: Vastavik ya parmarthik drishti se dekha jaye toh Pat aur Tantu mein koi bhed nahi hai. Pat sirf Tantu ka ek vishesh roop ya 'vivart' hai. Chunki bhed ka koi thos karan nahi milta, isliye unhe swaroop se ek hi maana jata hai.

user: Sansaar saagar se paar paane ka ekmaatra upaay kya bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Sansaar saagar se paar paane ka ekmaatra upaay 'Gyaan' yaani aatm-gyaan bataya gaya hai.

user: Vedanta ke anusar is vishal sansaar ki asal sacchai kya hai?
assistant: Ye vishal sansaar asal mein Param Brahma hi hai, ye ek nishchit aur atal satya hai.

user: Jab gyaan se Avidya ka naash hota hai, toh satya ki sthiti kaisi hoti hai?
assistant: Jab Avidya yaani agyaan ka parda hat-ta hai, toh satya hamesha ke liye 'prakashit' ho jaata hai aur uspar phir kabhi koi aavaran ya shanka nahi rehti.

user: Lila ne pichle janam ke sanskaaro ke baare mein kya tarka diya tha?
assistant: Lila ka kehna tha ki agar is janam ki cheezein pichle janam mein anubhav (experience) hi nahi ki gayi thi, toh unka sanskaar ya memory kaise ban sakti hai?

user: Sri Devi ke mutabik kya Vasana sirf purane anubhavo se hi banti hai?
assistant: Nahi, Sri Devi ne samjhaya ki keval purane sanskaar hi Vasana nahi hote, balki ek 'Anadi Avidya-shakti-rupa' Vasana bhi hoti hai jo srishti ka kaaran banti hai.

user: Agar sanskaar ko srishti ke liye zaroori maanein, toh Brahma ji ke paas nayi cheezon ka anubhav kaise ho sakta hai?
assistant: Brahma ji sarvajna (omniscient) hain, isliye unhe bhavishya ki cheezon ka pehle se hi anubhav ho sakta hai, jo unke sanskaar ka kaaran banta hai.

user: Kya pichle kalpa ke Brahma ke sanskaar naye Brahma ki deha ka kaaran bante hain?
assistant: Nahi, kyunki pichle kalpa ke Brahma mukti (liberation) paa chuke hote hain, isliye unke sanskaar naye janam ya srishti ka kaaran nahi bante.

user: Shri Yogavasistha Maharamayana ke anusar Moksha ka vastavik swaroop kya hai?
assistant: Moksha ka arth hai sansar ki param vismriti. Iska matlab hai ki vyakti sansarik dwait, rishto aur moh-maya se poori tarah anasakt ho jata hai aur apne nitya swaroop mein sthit ho jata hai.

user: Ek mukt purush ke liye priya aur apriya ki paribhasha kya reh jati hai?
assistant: Mukt vyakti ke liye kuch bhi priya ya apriya nahi reh jata. Shastra kehte hain 'Ashareeram vava santam', jiska arth hai ki jab ahankar ya sharir-bhav mit jata hai, tab sukh aur dukh vyakti ko sparsh nahi kar paate.

user: Anutpadamayi vimuktata yaani nitya mukti kab uday hoti hai?
assistant: Yeh sthayi mukti tabhi uday hoti hai jab ahankar ki badhayein aur sansar ka maulik agyan (avidya) poori tarah se nasht ho jaye. Bina agyan ke nasha ke mukti sthayi nahi ho sakti.

user: Rajju-sarpa (rassi aur saanp) ke drishtant se agyan ki nivritti ko kaise samjhaya gaya hai?
assistant: Rassi mein saanp ka bhram tabhi poori tarah khatam hota hai jab rassi ke vastavik swaroop ka gyan ho jaye. Agar sirf saanp ka darr shaant ho jaye par rassi ka gyan na ho, toh bhram phir se paida ho sakta hai. Isliye 'atyantik nivritti' yaani mool se khatm hona hi moksha ka marg hai.

user: Kya sirf Yoga se mann ki vrittiyon ko rok dena moksha ke liye kaafi hai?
assistant: Nahi, sirf Yoga ya samadhi se vrittiyon ko rokna adhi-adhuri shanti hai. Jab vyakti samadhi se bahar (vyutthan) aata hai, toh agyan maujood hone ke karan sansarik vikshep usey phir se gher lete hain.

user: Yogavasistha mein 'ek pishacha ki nivritti par doosra dikhna' iska kya matlab bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Iska arth hai ki ek moodh ya agyani purush jab bina gyan ke kisi ek mansik vikshep ya dukh se mukt hota hai, toh uski jagah doosra bhram ya kasht turant le leta hai. Jab tak Atmagyan se mool agyan nahi mitta, tab tak pishacho ki tarah samasyaein badalti rehti hain.

user: Viksherup ansh ki shanti ko purn nivritti kyun nahi mana jata?
assistant: Kyuki viksherup shanti kewal bahari chanchalta ko kuch samay ke liye dabati hai. Bina gyan ke sansar ka 'arth' (meaning) mann mein bana rehta hai, isliye samadhi toot-te hi sansar phir se satya dikhne lagta hai.

user: Darsanik aur yogik sandarbh mein 'Chiti' shabd ka asli arth kya hota hai?
assistant: Chiti ka mukhya arth shuddh chetna ya awareness hota hai. Yeh woh maulik element hai jo pure brahmand ka aadhar hai. Shaivmat jaise darshan mein ise 'Chit-shakti' kaha gaya hai, jo keval shant chetna nahi balki ek creative power hai jisse srishti prakat hoti hai. Yeh vyaktigat man ya 'Chitta' se alag aur zyada vyapak hoti hai.

user: Yoga Vasistha ke mutabiq Kaal (Time) aur Desh (Space) ki lambai ya duration ka kya sach hai?
assistant: Devi Saraswati ke anusar, jaise desh ki doori ek kalpana hai, waise hi kaal (samay) ki avadhi bhi sirf ek mansik pratiti ya illusion hai. Yeh 'Kshan' (moment) aur 'Kalp' (aeon) ka pura silsila keval un logo ko sach lagta hai jo apne janm aur sharir ke bhram mein phase hote hain. Asal mein yeh sab chetna ke upar ek adhyas (superimposition) hai.

user: Mrityu ke baad naye janm ya naye anubhav ka silsila kaise shuru hota hai?
assistant: Jab jeev mrityu-rupi moorchana ka anubhav karke purane sansaro ko bhool jata hai, tab Chidakaash (consciousness space) mein palak jhapakte hi naye sanskar udbhoot hote hain. Use turant mehsus hota hai ki 'Main yahan hoon' aur uska sharir apne purane sanskaro ke hisaab se hath-pair wala dikhne lagta hai. Yeh sab itni tezi se hota hai jaise aankh kholte hi sab kuch dikhne lage.

user: Chetna mein kis-kis tarah ke jagat ya worlds prakat ho sakte hain?
assistant: Chetna mein anant tarah ke jagat prakat ho sakte hain. Yeh Dharmamaya (punya ke mutabiq swarg), Karmamaya (ghar aur sansar), aur Akashmaya (kalpnik nagar) ho sakte hain. Kuch pralay tak sthir rehte hain aur kuch pal bhar ke liye hote hain. Ye sab jeev ke antahkaran ki vasanao aur karmo ke anuroop hote hain.

user: Kya aisa ho sakta hai ki humein kisi aisi cheez ka anubhav ho jo pehle kabhi dekhi hi na ho?
assistant: Haan, ise 'Ananubhoot' mein 'Anubhoot' ki bhranti kehte hain. Jaise swapna (dream) mein hum kisi ajnabi ko dekh kar bhi use apna rishtedar samajh lete hain, waise hi antahkaran mein bina kisi purane anubhav ke bhi 'yeh pehle dekha hai' ya 'yeh mera hai' wali feeling paida ho sakti hai. Yeh man ki ek vilakshan shakti hai.

user: Jagat aur Kamana (desire) ke beech kya sambandh bataya gaya hai?
assistant: Kamana hi asli jagat aur srishti hai. Kamana ki wajah se hi insaan ko desh aur kaal ka virodhabhas (contradiction) mehsus hota hai, jahan dur ki cheez paas aur paas ki dur lagti hai. Yeh pura vishwa ek mayavi akash mein banaya gaya kalpnik nagar hai jo keval bhram par adharit hai.

user: Agar sansar anaadi (beginningless) hai, toh kya har anubhav purani memory par hi adharit hota hai?
assistant: Nahi, iska khandanda karte huye kaha gaya hai ki Prajapati ki pratham srishtiyo mein anubhav 'smriti' (memory) ke bina bhi shuddh 'anubhav' ke roop mein hota hai. Smriti ka bhav toh baad mein dheere-dheere develop hota hai. Iska matlab hai ki har nayi pratiti ke liye purane janm ka anubhav hona anivarye nahi hai; chetna naye anubhav ko bina kisi purane karan ke bhi dikha sakti hai.

user: Sharir ke rishtedaro mein 'aatmiyata' (belongingness) ka bhav kaise paida hota hai jabki ve paraye hote hain?
assistant: Yadyapi rishtedar sharir se sambandhit hote hain aur aatmic star par bhinn hote hain, phir bhi unme aatmiyata isliye lagti hai kyunki jeev ne apne 'aatma sthan' aur 'man sthan' ki pehchaan sharir ke saath bahut mazbooti se kar li hai. Is taadatpya (identification) ke karan hi sharir se jude log 'apne' lagne lagte hain.

user: Pracheen Bhartiya darshan ke hisaab se jeevon ki utpatti ke char mukhya bhag kaunse hain?
assistant: Pracheen manyataon mein jeevon ko unki utpatti ke aadhar par char mukhya categories mein banta gaya hai: Jarāyuja, Aṇḍaja, Svedaja, aur Udbhijja.

user: Jarāyuja category ka matlab kya hota hai aur ismein kaunse jeev aate hain?
assistant: Jarāyuja un jeevon ko kaha jata hai jo seedhe maa ke garbh (womb) se janm lete hain. Is category mein manushya aur anya mammals jaise gaay aur bakri shamil hote hain.

user: Aṇḍaja kise kehte hain aur iske udaharankya hain?
assistant: Aṇḍaja ka matlab hai 'ande se janm lene wale'. Ismein sabhi pakshi, saamp (reptiles), machhliyan aur kai tarah ke keede-makode shamil hote hain.

user: Svedaja jeevon ki utpatti kaise maani jati hai?
assistant: Pracheen darshan ke anusar, Svedaja un jeevon ko kaha jata hai jo nami (moisture) ya pasine (sweat) se paida hote hain, jaise ki juyein (lice) aur makkhiyan.

user: Udbhijja category mein kis tarah ke jeev aate hain?
assistant: Udbhijja ka arth hai 'dharti ko phodkar nikalne wale'. Is category mein sabhi prakar ke ped-poudhe aur vanaspatiyan (vegetation) aati hain.

user: Jeevon ke is pracheen vargikaran ka mukhya aadhar kya hai?
assistant: Is vargikaran ka mukhya aadhar 'origin' yaani jeev ki utpatti ka tarika hai, jaise garbh, anda, nami, ya zameen se ugna.
